chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-5210 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. 26.01.2026. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. This Petition has been pending since 23.09.2025 with no one having come forward to press the cause, hence the matter having been fixed in Court today for orders as to non- prosecution. Under the given circumstances, where it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the Petition, the same stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
